name: Lucky Claw Machine
author: Poki
description: Lucky Claw Machine brings the classic arcade fun right to your fingertips! Control the claw, aim carefully, and grab the cutest prizes—plushies, toys, and rare treasures await! Test your skills, perfect your technique, and fill up your display wall with awesome collectibles. Can you catch them all? How to play Lucky Claw Machine? Move: WASD or the arrow keys Lower the claw: the space bar or Enter Change your camera angle: R Check your collections: C Who created Lucky Claw Machine? Lucky Claw Machine is created by CAMU. Play their other game on Poki: Fox Island Builder and Power Wash Cleanup ! How can I play Lucky Claw Machine for free? You can play Lucky Claw Machine for free on Poki. Can I play Lucky Claw Machine on mobile devices and desktop? Lucky Claw Machine can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
